Petition For Leave To Intervene Allowing Filing Of Complaint-In-Intervention And Summons
Off Calendar Jul-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Julie S. Kennedy of the law offices of Stander Reubens Thomas Kinsey (415.892.7676) appears as counsel for proposed intervenor/moving party, New York Marine and General Insurance Company

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Proposed intervenor New York Marine and General Insurance Company's petition for leave to intervene is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. New York Marine may file its proposed complaint in intervention by August 4, 2017. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
